Check and complete a model configuration list

Source: R/conf.R
check_conf.Rd

Checks whether a configuration list contains all required settings for admove. Missing settings are filled in from default_conf().

Usage

check_conf(conf = NULL, dat, verbose = TRUE)

Arguments

conf

An optional configuration list. If NULL, the default configuration generated by default_conf() is returned.

dat

A data list containing model input data, as produced by setup_data().

verbose

Logical; if TRUE, informative messages are printed when missing settings are added or when default settings are used.

Value

A named configuration list containing all required settings.

Details

The function compares the user-supplied configuration list with the default configuration produced by default_conf(). Any missing named entries are added, while existing entries in conf are preserved unchanged.

This function does not validate whether supplied configuration values are internally consistent; it only ensures that all required settings are present.

Examples

conf <- list(use_taxis = FALSE)
conf <- check_conf(conf, skjepo$dat)
#> Added missing configuration setting(s): use_ctags, use_dtags, use_stags, use_advection, obs_var_type, do_update, engine, ctmc_method, seasonal_cov, seasonal_spline

On this page
